Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand User Input Database Schema PostgreSQL with three tables order_event_log orders resources Normal Process Flow 7 steps Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Sample Data 4 cases Goal Identify anomalies Hypothesize causes Propose SQL queries

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Data vs Normal Flow Check each case against expected sequence Case 1001 follows perfectly Case 1002 Confirm Shipment Ship Goods before Credit Check Validate Stock Case 1003 Ship Goods before Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Confirm after Ship Case 1004 Receive Payment before Invoice checks shipping Verdict sequence violations

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Anomalies Sequence Violations Cases 1002 1003 1004 Missing Steps Credit Check Validate Stock Temporal Anomalies Payment before invoice late confirmation fast processing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses Process Bypass Override System UI Flaws Data Entry Logging Errors Policy Violations Pre payment Advance Payment Handling Staff skipping checks system allows progression without prerequisites

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Formulate SQL Queries Detect sequence violations using LAG Identify missing steps Analyze timing durations between steps Correlate anomalies with order type resources departments roles

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction Refinement Check Query logic refine conditions for out of order skipped steps PostgreSQL features window functions CASE LAG generate series array agg Ensure detects anomalies in sample data

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Refine queries iteratively improve missing steps query simplify verbose parts adjust conditions for violations add comments test mentally for syntax and logic

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure the Response Anomalies case by case Hypotheses categorized SQL queries with explanations professional concise aligned with prompt
